title: The Atlantic April 2026 - Part 262

George Packer is a staff writer at                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              The Atlantic                                                                                                                                                                          and the His most recent book of poems is                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           Proverbs of Limbo                                                                                                                                                                                                                                .

Robert Pinsky is a former poet laureate of the United States.
